title: Fix question relevance and replace Arcanus with Luffy

requirements.text: Update the backend character database to remove Arcanus and add Luffy from One Piece with appropriate attributes including name 'Monkey D. Luffy', category 'Anime Character', and description capturing his key characteristics as the protagonist of One Piece

quotes: REMOVE THAT ARCANUS THING AND USE LUFFY FROM ONE PIECE

acceptanceCriteria: Arcanus character is removed from the character database
Luffy character is added with name 'Monkey D. Luffy'
Luffy's category is set to 'Anime Character' or similar appropriate category
Luffy's description includes key traits like straw hat pirate captain, stretchy rubber powers, and dream to become Pirate King

requirements.text: Review and update the question bank to ensure all questions are relevant to guessing anime characters, fictional characters, and other character types, removing any questions that don't help distinguish between characters

quotes: QUESTIONS AND OPTIONS ARE NOT RELEVENT

acceptanceCriteria: Questions are directly related to character attributes that help narrow down possibilities
Each question has clear discriminatory power to filter candidates
Questions cover diverse attributes like physical traits, powers, personality, occupation, origin story, and relationships

requirements.text: Update answer patterns for all characters in the database to ensure they correctly map to the revised question set, with accurate Yes/No/Probably/Probably Not/Don't Know responses

quotes: QUESTIONS AND OPTIONS ARE NOT RELEVENT

acceptanceCriteria: All characters have complete answer patterns matching the question bank
Answer patterns accurately reflect each character's attributes
The decision tree logic can successfully narrow down to Luffy when appropriate answers are given

requirements.text: Update the character avatar display on the frontend to show Luffy instead of Arcanus during gameplay and on the guess reveal screen

quotes: REMOVE THAT ARCANUS THING AND USE LUFFY FROM ONE PIECE

acceptanceCriteria: Character avatar shows Luffy when he is the guessed character
No references to Arcanus appear in the UI
Character name displays as 'Monkey D. Luffy' or 'Luffy' in the guess reveal

constraints: Do not change the single-actor backend architecture
Maintain the existing game flow and question-answer mechanism
Keep the mystical UI design aesthetic intact

required: Anime-style illustration of Monkey D. Luffy from One Piece showing his signature straw hat, red vest, and cheerful expression (luffy-avatar.dim_400x400.png)
